choice: Flat membership for v1: every household member has full read/write on that household's people, assets, scenarios, and Plan, and can invite others. Defer view-only/granular roles.
rationale: The objective explicitly grants invite rights to 'any household user,' signalling a trust-equal household model rather than a permissions hierarchy. A household is typically a couple or close family who already share these finances, so per-field or view-only roles add real complexity (UI gating, query filtering, audit) for a benefit v1 doesn't need. Keep the data shape able to carry a role enum later, but ship one role.
